hero.title: Pass Your Physiotherapy Exam with
hero.description: Master the Palestinian Physiotherapy Association licensing exam with our intelligent question bank. Get instant feedback, detailed explanations, and track your progress with personalized analytics.

hero.featureProgressDesc: Monitor your improvement with detailed analytics
hero.featureFeedbackDesc: Learn from detailed explanations for every answer
